name: python3-pip
title: python3-pip
description:
Python package installer
pip is the Python package installer.  It integrates with virtualenv, doesn't
do partial installs, can save package state for replaying, can install from
non-egg sources, and can install from version control repositories.
.
This is the Python 3 version of the package.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use pip because Python package installer.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use pip as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `pip3 <command> [options]` as documented upstream for pip.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair pip with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `pip --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.readme: pip3 - package manager for Python packages
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install python-pip. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `pip3 <command> [options]`.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: Python package installer.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: pip3 - package manager for Python packages.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install python-pip
Install with: sudo apt install python-pip
